title: LLM Pricing Data Schema
description: Schema for LLM API pricing data (v5.0 — nested modality pricing)

Model.description: A single LLM model with pricing per currency and provider metadata.

pricing.description: Pricing keyed by currency code (e.g. USD, CNY).

CurrencyPricing.description: Pricing for a model in a specific currency. Each modality has its own namespace — fields are never reused across modalities.

text.description: Text token pricing ($/1M tokens). Present for all standard language models.

audio.description: Audio token pricing ($/1M tokens). Present for TTS and voice I/O models.

image.description: Image pricing. input_price is $/1M tokens (image input tokens). output_price is $/image (flat per-image fee for generation models).

tiered_pricing.description: Tiered pricing (e.g. price differs by context length)

ModalityPricing.description: Pricing for a single modality (text or audio). Both fields are $/1M tokens.

ImageModalityPricing.description: Pricing for image modality. Units differ: input_price is $/1M tokens (image input); output_price is $/image (flat fee per generated image).

output_price.description: Flat fee per generated output image (NOT per-token)

cache_read_input_price.description: Price for reading from cache per 1M tokens

cache_creation_input_price.description: Price for creating cache entry per 1M tokens

input_price.description: Batch API input price per 1M tokens

output_price.description: Batch API output price per 1M tokens

tier_start.description: Inclusive start of token range for this tier

tier_end.description: Exclusive end of token range (omitted for the last/open-ended tier)

input_price.description: Input price per 1M tokens for this tier

output_price.description: Output price per 1M tokens for this tier

_merged_from.description: Source that contributed the winning price for this model
